summary: No performance or audio details provided; reviewers focused on correcting the show date to June 13 1993.
review: The two available reviews address only a metadata issue, confirming that the recording is from June 13, 1993 rather than 1996. There are no comments regarding the soundboard source, audio clarity, or musical performance, leaving those aspects unevaluated.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews contain no information on show or recording quality, so rating defaults to average with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No remarks about sound quality, mix, or source type were provided.
